overall.description: First-person shooter game footage showing a player walking through a dimly lit industrial concrete corridor toward a red-lit exit, then turning right into a stairwell with blue graffiti and natural light from above. The scene features realistic textures, dynamic lighting, and a visible weapon at the bottom of the screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial corridor with exposed ceiling pipes

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the narrow corridor toward the red light at the end, weapon held at ready

entered.detail: rough concrete block walls with horizontal construction lines
metal pipes and conduits running along the ceiling
doorway emitting intense red light at the corridor end
white plastic bucket or container on the floor
single overhead light fixture illuminating the corridor

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow, dimly lit industrial corridor with concrete block walls and exposed ceiling pipes. A red-lit doorway glows at the far end while a white bucket sits on the floor to the right. The environment is enclosed with artificial lighting from a single overhead fixture.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell with blue graffiti and metal railings

events.description: turns right through doorway from dark corridor into concrete stairwell with natural light from above
lighting shifts from artificial dim to mixed natural light as entering the stairwell

agents.ego_description: turns right through the doorway and enters the stairwell area, moving toward the concrete stairs

entered.detail: doorway frame leading from corridor to stairwell
open concrete stairwell with stairs ascending to the right
concrete wall covered with blue spray paint graffiti
black metal railing along the concrete stairs
wooden pallet or debris on the concrete floor

segments.scene_description: The player turns right through a doorway into a concrete stairwell illuminated by natural light from above. Blue graffiti covers the left wall while metal railings line the stairs. A concrete pillar stands to the right and debris litters the floor. The transition from the dark corridor to this brighter, semi-open space is marked by a significant lighting change.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective moving from a claustrophobic, dimly lit industrial corridor into a bright, open concrete stairwell. It begins by advancing through a narrow passage of concrete block walls and exposed ceiling pipes, passing a white bucket on the floor while heading toward a glowing red doorway. As the camera reaches the exit and turns right, the oppressive artificial lighting shifts abruptly to natural light streaming from above. The scene then opens into a stairwell where blue graffiti adorns the left wall and metal railings line the steps, before passing a concrete pillar and scattered debris on the floor.
